candidate_definition_hints.text: 🔒 Consolidating and extending hosts files from several well-curated sources. Optionally pick extensions for porn, social media, and other categories.

FROM docker.io/python:3-alpine ENV IN_CONTAINER=1 RUN apk add --no-cache git sudo COPY . /hosts RUN pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade -r /hosts/requirements.txt ENV PATH=$PATH:/hosts WORKDIR /hosts
